product.title: IT Cosmetics CC+ Airbrush Perfecting Powder Foundation - Sheer to Full Coverage Pressed Powder, Blurring Pores & Dark Spots, Anti-Aging Face Makeup, Hydrolyzed Collagen & Niacinamide - 0.33 oz

primaryFeatures.color: Medium (light medium shade with warm undertones)

featureBullets: WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT - Your Skin But Better CC+ Airbrush Perfecting Powder delivers a skin-softening, flawless effect in 30 seconds. This talc-free finishing powder won’t settle into fine lines or pores, ensuring airbrushed results every time

BENEFITS - This sheer-to-full coverage finishing powder transforms skin with optical-blurring pigments that camouflage pores, dark spots, hyperpigmentation, acne scars and other imperfections for a flawless complexion
ANTI-AGING INGREDIENTS - Formulated with skin-loving hydrolyzed collagen, hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, and peptides to nourish your skin while providing buildable, flawless coverage
HOW TO APPLY - Lightly sweep on over your favorite foundation using the Heavenly Luxe Wand Ball Powder Brush #8 as a finishing powder. Can also be worn as buildable coverage to perfect your skin tone
IT REALLY WORKS - Developed with clinical input from plastic surgeons and dermatologist skincare expertise, IT Cosmetics delivers problem-solving makeup products with real, visible results

Delivers a skin-softening, flawless effect in 30 seconds. Contains hyaluronic acid, niacinamide & peptides.
#6,200 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #36 in Face Powder

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the powder foundation provides excellent coverage and makes their skin look amazing, with a natural look that stays on all day. The product is easy to apply, with one customer noting it works well with a sponge applicator, and customers appreciate its effectiveness. The color receives mixed feedback - while some say it matches their skin tone, others find it darker than expected. The texture also gets mixed reviews, with some finding it soft while others describe it as cakey.

reviews.reviewText: I am 43 and I have worn many different foundations powders very expensive ones. I have tried everything from cover girl to Elizabeth Arden to Clinique to Mack to dermablend. I have very translucent skin, especially around my eyelids and I have always been self-conscious about this and was teased at a very young age so I started wearing makeup at age 12. In all my years of wearing makeup, I have not found a better powder or a better company just in general for make up this company really has a good product. It doesn’t leave your pores feeling clogged. It looks very natural, but it also offers good coverage at the same time. It doesn’t look caked on. They have gorgeous natural colors and I won’t wear anything else. They really are IT!! ! For me anyways! I was not paid or given free product to review this item. I just really like it a lot and have been wearing it for a long time. Definitely recommend pairing this with the liquid foundation in the tube and the liquid concealer. Then I brush the powder over the top for a finish look and use a setting spray my makeup stays on the entire day and I’m a massage therapist not lotion or sweat nor kids running up and hugging me against my face can take this off until I’m ready to use my makeup wipe at the end of the day. Their products usually last about six months for me and for the price that’s a steal! I wear makeup 5 to 7 days a week typically. OK stop reading my review and just add to cart already!! 😜
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 13, 2025

productSpecs.color: Medium Tan (medium shade with warm undertones)

reviews.reviewTitle: Provides good coverage over my foundation
reviews.reviewText: I love this face powder and find it works well with my sensitive skin. My only issue is it tends to cake some by the end of the day (about 10 hours of wear). I'm not sure if the caking is because of my foundation or it's just the powder alone. I wear este lauder double wear under this powder. Maybe I need to try this with the IT line of foundations? I do like this powder a lot and have purchased several times at Sephora when they had it and also at Ulta. I'm so happy Amazon has it for a slightly cheaper price. I have purchased twice from the IT store on Amazon and have been pleased with the quality of my purchase.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 19, 2026

productSpecs.color: Light (fair light shade with warm undertones)

reviews.reviewTitle: Best Foundation Powder I’ve Ever Used!
reviews.reviewText: Why did you pick this product vs others?: The IT Cosmetics CC+ Airbrush Perfecting Powder is hands down the best foundation powder I’ve ever tried. It gives such a smooth, flawless finish without feeling heavy or cakey. It blurs pores, evens out my skin tone, and leaves a soft, natural-looking glow—almost like a filter for your face! What I love most is how buildable it is. I can wear it lightly for everyday errands or layer it over my CC cream for a more polished, full-coverage look that still feels breathable. It stays in place throughout the day and doesn’t settle into fine lines or dry patches. It’s perfect for touch-ups too—compact, mess-free, and always gives my skin that fresh, airbrushed look. If you’re looking for a powder that actually acts like a foundation while still being easy and comfortable to wear, this is it. Holy grail status!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 20, 2025

productSpecs.color: Medium (light medium shade with warm undertones)

reviews.reviewText: This has become my go-to, I repurchased it multiple times—coverage is solid, shade match works, and it’s easy to build into my simple routine. It can highlight fine lines a bit more than I’d like, and the price is on the higher side, but overall it’s reliable, flattering, and worth coming back to.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on August 20, 2025
